account.changeDescription: Verify your current password, then change it to a new one.
account.setDescription: Set a password on this account to enable id/pw login.

loginMethods.title: Login & security
loginMethods.description: Manage sign-in methods and password for this account.
loginMethods.googleDescription: Connect your Google account while signed in with id/pw, then use Google to sign in next time.
loginMethods.googleNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured on this server.

install.issueDescription: See Claude and Codex usage in your account.
install.issueDescriptionWithContent: See Claude and Codex usage in your account.
install.devicesDescription: Recent events, control sync, and shim version per device.
install.sharedHost: Multiple devices use this computer name, so event totals cannot be separated.
install.noDevices: No devices yet. After installing the shim, using claude/codex will make devices appear here.

deviceControl.saved: Saved. The shim will apply it on the next sync.
deviceControl.failed: Could not save the device control request.
deviceControl.serverDisabled: Content collection is disabled on this server.
deviceControl.periodicInactive: Periodic collection is off, so changes may be delayed.
deviceControl.syncStale: The last control sync is more than 15 minutes old.
deviceControl.expired: The device did not respond before the request expired. You can try again.

diagnostic.scheduler_inactive: Periodic collection is not installed or is inactive.
diagnostic.collection_stale: Collection is delayed beyond the configured schedule.
diagnostic.token_invalid: The device token has expired or was revoked.
diagnostic.endpoint_not_found: The collection server address is not valid.
diagnostic.endpoint_unreachable: The device cannot reach the collection server.
diagnostic.endpoint_unhealthy: The collection server did not return a healthy response.
diagnostic.target_unavailable: This server connection is missing on the device.
diagnostic.path_misconfigured: The shim path comes after the AI tool path.
diagnostic.doctor_failed: The device diagnostic found a problem.

queued.collect: Collection was requested for the next device sync.

running.collect: The device is processing the collection request.
running.doctor: The device is processing the diagnostic command.

localControl.title: Control this computer's shim
localControl.description: Connect safely from the browser to toard-shim on this computer only.
localControl.unavailable: Could not connect to the local shim.
localControl.fallback: Check that the latest shim and periodic collection are running. If the browser blocked the local connection window, allow pop-ups for this site and try again. The manual commands below remain available.
localControl.security: Only the currently registered toard server can connect. Tokens, credentials, and raw logs are never exposed to the browser.

install.tokensDescription: Tokens are the server authentication unit. Issue one token per machine so you can revoke only the affected machine when needed.
install.noTokens: No active tokens. Issue a token for a new machine and it will appear here.
install.revokeTokenDescription: Only the {label} token will be revoked. Machines using this token stop collecting until they are reinstalled with a new token.

onboarding.issueAdditional: Issue token for a new machine
onboarding.issueSuccess: A new token has been issued — it has been filled into the install command below.
onboarding.newTokenNotice: New token — shown only now. Run the command below on the machine you are setting up.
onboarding.newTokenReissueHint: Tokens already installed on other machines remain valid. Replace credentials only on machines you want to move to this token.
onboarding.issueHint: Issue above and your token is filled into the command below.
onboarding.collectContentLabel: Also collect content <muted>(opt-in) — prompts and responses are stored encrypted; only you can view them in <link>My history</link>.</muted>
onboarding.collectContentGated: Content collection must be enabled by an administrator on the server.
onboarding.oneLinerDescription: Turns on toard collection for this device. After running it, use claude/codex as usual.
onboarding.uninstallDescription: Removes toard collection settings from this device. Your existing Claude/Codex installation stays in place.

wizard.introDescription: Claude and Codex usage will be recorded in your account automatically.
wizard.introPrivacyMetadata: Only usage metadata is recorded; prompts and code are not sent.
wizard.introPrivacyContent: Prompts and responses are encrypted and recorded in My history.
wizard.platformDescription: We selected one automatically. Change it if needed.

installTitle.linux: Paste the command into your terminal

openTerminal.windows: Search for PowerShell in the Start menu and open it.
openTerminal.macos: Search for Terminal in Spotlight and open it.
openTerminal.linux: Open the terminal you normally use.

wizard.verifyDescription: Keep the PowerShell or terminal window open.
wizard.waiting: Waiting for the first signal from this computer…
wizard.stalledDescription: Check the terminal for a completion message or run the command again.
wizard.contentMetadataOnly: Only usage metadata is recorded; prompts and code are not sent.
wizard.contentWithPrompts: Transport is protected, and the server encrypts content before storage. The database and backups store ciphertext.
wizard.recoveryTitle: Save and verify your Recovery Kit
wizard.recoveryDescription: Run the command below in the same terminal to open the local 24-word Recovery Kit flow.
wizard.recoveryPrivacy: The 24 words and encryption key never reach the server. E2EE content collection starts only after verification.
wizard.recoveryWaiting: Waiting for local Recovery Kit verification…

mfa.passkeyDescription: Protect password sign-in and My history with Face ID, Touch ID, Windows Hello, or your device screen lock.
mfa.passkeyLoginDescription: Require a registered passkey after the email and password are verified.
mfa.passkeyHistoryDescription: Unlock the history page and content APIs with a passkey for 30 minutes.
mfa.loginProtectionNeedsPassword: Set a password on this account before enabling this option.

errors.passkeyFailed: The passkey operation could not be completed. Try again.
errors.passkeyRemoveFailed: The last passkey cannot be removed while protection is enabled. Disable protection first or add another passkey.

historySecurity.title: History security
historySecurity.description: View the server-managed encryption status of your history content.
historySecurity.keyAutoCreate: Created automatically with the first content
historySecurity.privacyBoundary: Content is encrypted before storage, remains ciphertext in the database and backups, and cannot be opened by another user's request. Infrastructure operators who hold both application server and KMS permissions can decrypt it.
historySecurity.statusUnavailable: The encryption status is currently unavailable. Ask an administrator to check the server key configuration.
historySecurity.legacyDescription: This appears only while previous records remain to be migrated to server-managed encryption.
historySecurity.legacyPending: The previous E2EE setup was not completed.
historySecurity.legacyActive: Previous E2EE data is waiting for managed-encryption migration.
historySecurity.legacyMigrating: Migrating {count} previous records to server-managed encryption.
historySecurity.legacyBlocked: Migration is blocked for {count} previous E2EE records. No data was deleted.
historySecurity.legacyComplete: Migration of previous E2EE data is complete.
historySecurity.legacyReadOnly: This is read-only information for the migration state of previous encrypted records.

management.title: Manage connected computers
management.description: Advanced actions for diagnostics, updates, manual setup, and removal.
management.platform: Computer where the command will run

errors.issueTokenFailed: Failed to issue token. Please try again.
errors.revokeTokenFailed: Failed to revoke token. Please try again.

timezone.title: Display timezone
timezone.description: Timezone used for "today" boundaries and chart axes on usage screens. Auto follows your browser's timezone.

appearance.title: Preferences
appearance.description: Theme, color, and dashboard view apply to this device only; the display timezone is saved to your account.
